cards.title: Tree Structures
cards.governance_note: Define root, edge meaning, levels, leaves, paths, and subtrees.

cards.title: Recursive Structure
cards.governance_note: State base cases, recursive steps, traversal method, and termination conditions.

cards.title: Tree Invariants
cards.governance_note: Preserve no-cycle, parent, ordering, heap, prefix, balance, and routing invariants.

cards.title: False Hierarchy Risk
cards.governance_note: Audit cross-links, multiple membership, ambiguous categories, and network relationships hidden by the tree.
